call these other ones that keep appearing.

and contribute to the growing ecosystem.

Now, are these models, like,
someone want to use this because they're on the cutting edge,

Like, or if I have four, I have five, I've 18 machines in front of me,

Yes.

some of these more regulated spaces, like health care, et cetera,

The benefit to this as well.
The benefit to this is that some providers are not open-animal.
